data_sources.note: Jackson Market Link Pro III (launch 2025-05-19, JNL). 6-yr surrender 8/8/7/6/5/4. 1-yr S&P 500 PTP cap with 10% buffer = 9.5% cap; 6-yr S&P 500 PTP with 20% buffer = 80% participation rate (NOT cap — crediting_method changed from 'cap' to 'participation'). 10% free withdrawal corridor. Spec surrender updated 7/7/6/5/4 (5yr) -> 8/8/7/6/5/4 (6yr); 1-yr cap 0.10 -> 0.095; 6-yr crediting_method 'cap'/0.55 -> 'participation'/0.80; base has NO GLWB rider (rider type 'none' retained — +Income rider is optional, 1.45% if added, not modeled here).

Jackson Market Link Pro combined SEC document (Jackson National Life Insurance Company, CIK 931788). Confirms base RILA structure, 10% free annual withdrawal of remaining premium, MVA applies to amounts over free corridor.
Jackson National Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent), affirmed Dec 18, 2025. Long-term Issuer Credit Rating upgraded to 'a+' from 'a' Dec 2025.
Jackson National Life Insurance Company NAIC code 65056 (MI-domiciled). 2024 individual annuity premium $17.5B (8th-largest US issuer).
